emails.subject: FW: NNG bus plan
emails.body: FW: NNG bus plan Shelley: Do you have any information on Project Max that we could use in the business plan for NNG?

emails.subject: Re: FW: NNG bus plan
emails.body: Re: FW: NNG bus plan There are a couple of slides in the recent bank package NNG prepared and a few more slides in the original 2002 budget package. I'm a vacation day but have to stop by the office later today and will round these up Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: FW: NNG bus plan
emails.body: RE: FW: NNG bus plan I have the slides but did not know if they were still accurate and that Project Max was still a "go". To: Howard, Kevin A.
